name: CEOClaw
description: AI startup with a CEO agent that manages a team of specialist agents via Telegram

githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token (repo creation scope)

telegramGroupId.description: Telegram group chat ID where the team communicates

openclawStateDir.description: OpenClaw state directory (default: ~/.openclaw). Used to write agent SOUL.md files.

loopIntervalMinutes.description: CEO OODA loop cron interval in minutes (default: 30)
